differential_diagnoses: Chronic portal vein thrombosis (cavernous transformation) secondary to remote abdominal trauma
Portal hypertensive enteropathy / mesenteric venous ischemia
next_steps: Mesenteric CT angiography to evaluate mesenteric vasculature and potential ischemia
Consultation with Interventional Radiology for portal pressure measurement and potential portosystemic shunt evaluation
Transjugular liver biopsy with hepatic vein pressure gradient (HVPG) measurement
Hypercoagulability workup (JAK2 mutation, PNH testing, Protein C/S/Antithrombin levels, Factor V Leiden, Prothrombin gene mutation)
Echocardiogram to rule out right-sided heart failure or constrictive pericarditis
Supportive care for pain management and optimization of beta-blocker therapy
